name: Middlesex Water Company
description: Middlesex Water Company is a water utility company that provides a full range of regulated and non-regulated water, wastewater utility, and related services. Primarily operating in New Jersey and Delaware, the company is responsible for the collection, treatment, and distribution of water to residential, commercial, industrial, and fire protection customers. Incorporated in 1897, Middlesex Water Company focuses on infrastructure investment and environmental stewardship to ensure the delivery of safe, reliable water services to the communities it serves, while maintaining a commitment to sustainability and operational excellence in the utility sector.
